steps.title: Separate methods from findings
steps.content: The student wants the study’s methods: what the researchers did. The relevant notes say they tagged 138 female wood ducks with radio frequency ID trackers and recorded how many nest boxes each duck visited.

steps.title: Use only procedure details
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B include findings about how many boxes ducks visited or which ducks visited more, so they are not methods-only answers. Choice D invents site inspections. The sentence about tagging ducks and recording nest-box visits presents the method. The answer is C.
